label: Technician (starter set)
note: A small starter set of representative questions. Drop the full NCVEC pool JSON in this folder to expand it.

questions.question: Which agency regulates and enforces the rules for the Amateur Radio Service in the US?
Which frequency is in the 6 meter amateur band?
What type of call sign has a single letter in both the prefix and suffix?
What is the most common repeater frequency offset in the 2 meter band?
How is FM-phone emission usually transmitted on VHF/UHF?
Why might the range of VHF/UHF signals vary as you move around obstructions?
What could be used to cure distorted audio caused by RF on a transmitter ground lead?
Electrical current is measured in which units?
What is the formula used to calculate electrical power (P) in a DC circuit?
What electrical component opposes the flow of current in a DC circuit?
Which term describes a device that combines several semiconductors into one package?
Which emission mode has the narrowest bandwidth?
What is a beam antenna?
answers: An antenna that concentrates signals in one direction

questions.question: Which is a safety hazard of a 12-volt storage battery?
answers: Shorting the terminals can cause burns, fire, or explosion

questions.question: What type of radiation are radio signals?
